svg.text: The Paved Road: Empowered AI Building, Governed by ai-protect
Citizen builders take an idea to production with Claude — ai-protect auto-scans every SDLC stage and escalates to a human only when the risk tier earns it. “Paved road > gates.”
no human gate on most of the road
MICROSOFT & SANCTIONED AI RAILS (the paved infrastructure — using it IS the enforcement)
manifest in · CI gates run here
↺ continuous validation — re-tier on drift / new KEV intel
Rows = WHO acts (Builder · AppSec · Governance · ai-protect)
